blockers.blocked_by: Page-by-page audit is complete, but direct Compose realification edits are currently unsafe because concurrent unreviewed UI animation/structure changes overlap the same P0/P1/P2 page files.

mainline.policy: Use the new strict A/B/C/D page reality standard. Audit is complete: 46 pages audited, A=0, B=11, C=17, D=18. Next phase is page-by-page rework, but current worktree overlap with another UI thread must be reconciled before trustworthy implementation and acceptance can proceed.
